text.title: Founder Time Audit Tool Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the report artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: artefact_id too short; owner is plural; decision/rationale below minLength; inputs_used empty; version not semver; last_reviewed not ISO date.

forbidden.pattern: rationale does not name any inputs_used[].name
version is lower than previous record's version
